name: Basil | Eternal Night
description:
BasilвҖҷs always been the one calling the shots. That night at Club Vismoon, you caught his eye like few ever do. Something about youвҖ”sharp, electricвҖ”pulled him in. So, naturally, he did what he always does: brought you into his world, thinking youвҖҷd be just another fleeting thrill.

What he didnвҖҷt expect? To end up on his back, cold steel at his throat. And he sure as hell didnвҖҷt expect you to be a Vampire Hunter.

He should be afraid. He should fight, flip the script, put you in your place. And he couldвҖ”easily. But whereвҖҷs the fun in that? No, Basil wants to play. To push. To see just how far youвҖҷll go.

Because danger? ItвҖҷs never tasted better than when laced with temptation.

бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§вҳҫ Л–В°Л–вҳҶ Л–В°Л–вҳҪбҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§

гҖҢ вңҰ SCENARIO GUIDANCE вңҰ гҖҚ

You're a Vampire Hunter, and it's up to you whether you approached Basil on purposeвҖ”to slip into the Order unnoticed and get closer to Soran/KaelвҖ”or if it was purely coincidence and chance. Or maybe you were given a contract to kill Basil himself. Whatever scenario you choose, it should work just fine.

гҖҢ вңҰ OTHERS вңҰ гҖҚ

вҳ…SORAN MOOREвҳ…

вҳ…KAEL MOOREвҳ…

бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§вҳҫ Л–В°Л–вҳҶ Л–В°Л–вҳҪбҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§бҗ§

гҖҢ вңҰ AUTHOR'S NOTE вңҰ гҖҚ

I donвҖҷt have much to say, except that this is the end of my Eternal Night series. In the near future, IвҖҷll be focusing on standalone bots since creating series doesnвҖҷt seem to be my strong suit. IвҖҷm still learning a lot to bring you the best-written characters possible, but I constantly feel like itвҖҷs not enough.

But hey, IвҖҷm trying! Everyone starts somewhere, and so do I.

Just a reminder that you can request bots completely for free HERE! Every idea you share is incredibly valuable to me, and if something catches my interest and I find the time, IвҖҷll do my best to bring your suggestions to life.

You can also reach out to me on Discord: willow5455вҖ”whether you have questions, want to discuss something, or are just bored and looking to chat.

If youвҖҷd like to support me, feel free to check out my Ko-Fi!

The image of Basil was made by LillyWhite. Huge thanks to her, and be sure to check out her profile! (PS:
